content.claim: The teaching profession is divided on the 6/8-year gimnázium system: the president of the Pedagógusok Szakszervezete (PSZ) supports phasing the system out, while a PDSZ representative emphasizes addressing segregation more broadly, preventing unified labor coalition action on this specific issue.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Political feasibility lens
limitations: Only two union voices are cited; no systematic survey of rank-and-file teacher opinion is referenced
The substantive disagreement is framed as differences in emphasis rather than direct contradiction
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
